svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="3" border="60"> <diagram name="第 1 页" id="tzYsN6SboeIWAP_yxsLw"> <mxGraphModel dx="877" dy="514" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="mxMM3ZLdIngC-Mx6RPGR-1" edge="1" parent="1" source="mxMM3ZLdIngC-Mx6RPGR-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#646464;" target="mxMM3ZLdIngC-Mx6RPGR-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mxMM3ZLdIngC-Mx6RPGR-2" parent="1" style="swimlane;rounded=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="⚡ Event Sources" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="200" x="50" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mxMM3ZLdIngC-Mx6RPGR-3" parent="mxMM3ZLdIngC-Mx6RPGR-2" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;" value="💬 Chat Apps
